title: Identify the full transitive blast radius of a change
prompt: Without editing any source, determine the COMPLETE set of functions that would be affected — directly OR transitively, at any call depth — if the return value of `getValue` in src/core.js changed. Write each affected function's name on its own line to a file named affected.txt in the repo root.
hypothesis: Kit ON uses gitnexus_impact(upstream) to get the whole call chain in one shot; OFF greps `getValue`, finds only the direct caller, and misses the transitive ones.
